action.reasoning: Observation: the ensemble eval failed due to predict.py importing ImageNet normalization constants that model.py does not export. Analysis: this is a simple prediction-script regression; the checkpoint artifacts are valid. Decision: patch predict.py to define normalization constants locally and make checkpoint arg handling robust, then resubmit the low-cost 2e+3e ensemble/TTA evaluation to see if it improves over the best single checkpoint.
